title: IMP-0042 Design Preview (Proposed Change Plan)
description: What the user approves at CP2 before anything is built, for bug-fix / feature-request / refactor / optimization. Authored by QA (diagnosis/baseline) or ARCH (feature-request integration note) as a '## Proposed Change Plan' block; this schema is the normalized form for mechanical validation (validator lands with IMP-0029).

files_to_change.description: path:line entries for every file the change will touch.

interface_changes.description: Signatures, endpoints, or schemas that change; empty when none.

approach.description: 2-4 sentences: what will be done and why this way.

before_after.description: One concrete example: current behavior -> post-change behavior.

test_plan.description: The tests/checks that will prove the change works.

risks.description: What could break and the blast radius; 'minimal' when honestly so.
